sentence_reviews.text: Reflection and verifier loops inspect intermediate work, compare it against tests or criteria, and revise, reject, or escalate candidate solutions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML and AIMA textbook references for model evaluation, scoring, reward/preference modeling, uncertainty, and validation concepts. AIMA search/evaluation/testing topics provide general support for candidate evaluation and repair but not modern LLM reflection loops.
sentence_reviews.notes: Inspection against tests/criteria and revision is defensible from evaluation/search/verification concepts, but no cited primary reflection-loop paper is present.

sentence_reviews.text: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Self-consistency & best-of-N inference, Observe–plan–act agent loops.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
